description: In-package AUTHORED skill catalog. agentware ships ZERO third-party skills: every entry below is authored in-repo (security baked in) and lives under its `source` path. `scripts/agentware skill add` resolves ONLY these trusted in-repo sources by default; any non-catalog/external source is gated behind skill-vetter + explicit confirmation. This is NEVER an internet fetcher.

skills.name: sast-audit
skills.summary: Whole-repository static application security testing organized by vulnerability class (SQLi, XSS, RCE, SSRF, IDOR, ...).

skills.name: skill-vetter
skills.summary: Security gate that vets any external skill, MCP server, or plugin BEFORE it is trusted or installed.

skills.name: dependency-supply-chain-audit
skills.summary: Audit dependencies and the supply chain for CVEs, unpinned versions, typosquats, and generate an SBOM.

skills.name: secure-by-design
skills.summary: Apply security at design time with an OWASP Top 10:2025 / ASVS 5.0 / LLM Top 10 requirements checklist.

skills.name: threat-modeling
skills.summary: Enumerate threats at design time using STRIDE, data-flow diagrams, and trust-boundary analysis.

skills.name: ci-cd-security-audit
skills.summary: Audit CI/CD pipelines and agent integration points for injection, privilege escalation, and secret exfiltration.

skills.name: test-authoring
skills.summary: Author and run focused, high-signal tests the TDD way (red -> green -> harden).

skills.name: systematic-debugging
skills.summary: Find the root cause of a bug methodically: reproduce -> isolate -> hypothesize -> fix -> confirm.

skills.name: git-commit-pr-workflow
skills.summary: Turn a working diff into Conventional Commits, a PR, and a changelog -- PROPOSES, never commits.

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.summary: Scaffold a new spec-compliant, portable Agent Skill and validate it against the agentskills.io standard.

skills.name: env-doctor
skills.summary: Diagnose and fix a broken developer environment BEFORE work starts.

skills.name: frontend-design
skills.summary: Produce bold, distinctive, accessible UI instead of generic AI-slop output.

skills.name: backend-verification
skills.summary: Verify a running backend endpoint actually works by calling it yourself (R-VERIFY-03/04).

skills.name: safe-migration
skills.summary: Change data, schema, config, or file layout safely -- backup + tested rollback before touching anything.
